[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010111111 8
1 0111110110 7
2 0000111100 4
3 0111110110 7
4 1101110100 6
5 1111110111 9
6 1101010111 7
